method: Derived from A.1 ambiguity_register.json (AMB-001..AMB-007) + A.2 lifecycle classification (PARTIAL nodes) + boundary exclusion gaps

missing_artifacts.name: Stream 00.2 — Canonical Layer Model Restoration
missing_artifacts.impact: Blocks full confirmation of L1-L6 model. L0-L8 canonical definition cannot be verified. L1, L2, L7, L8 have no anchor. L3-L6 fragments exist but are incomplete without the defining document.
missing_artifacts.search_result: NOT FOUND in any accessible repo (k-pi, krayu-knowledge, krayu-mirror, krayu-program-intelligence)
missing_artifacts.resolution_path: Must be located in an external or private repository, or must be reconstructed by authoritative authorship. Cannot be resolved by evidence-first search alone.
missing_artifacts.effect_on_l1_l6: Primary blocker for L1-L6 CONFIRMED verdict. Without this, verdict remains MODIFIED.

missing_artifacts.name: Stream 75.x — Program Diagnosis and Intelligence Models (Interpretation Layer)
missing_artifacts.impact: Interpretation layer is architecturally referenced but absent. 42.23/rewiring_plan.md confirms '75.x interpretation layer: remains blocked'. Demo surface routes around it. Without 75.x, the interpretation path is incomplete and the WOW chain operates in compensated mode.
missing_artifacts.search_result: NOT FOUND in any accessible repo
missing_artifacts.resolution_path: 75.x must be defined and executed to complete the interpretation layer. Currently a known architectural gap.
missing_artifacts.effect_on_l1_l6: Does not block current verdict. Relevant to future architecture reassessment.

missing_artifacts.name: 40.8 Complete Execution Artifacts
missing_artifacts.impact: Stage 8 (Agentic Orchestration) has thinner execution evidence than 40.2-40.7. Named inconsistently (delivery vs. orchestration per AMB-002). Present in pipeline specification but execution outputs not observed with same density as core stages.
missing_artifacts.search_result: PARTIAL — pipeline spec references exist; execution artifact density lower
missing_artifacts.resolution_path: 40.8 outputs should be verified against run_01_blueedge completed artifacts. Naming conflict (delivery vs. orchestration) should be resolved by canonical document authority.
missing_artifacts.effect_on_l1_l6: Does not affect L1-L6 verdict. Relevant to 9-Stage Pipeline completeness.

missing_artifacts.name: 40.9 Structured Feedback Records
missing_artifacts.impact: Stage 9 (Feedback) is defined in pipeline specification but execution feedback records were not observed in A.1 crawl with sufficient density to confirm the feedback loop is operational.
missing_artifacts.search_result: PARTIAL — pipeline spec reference exists; execution outputs not confirmed
missing_artifacts.resolution_path: Verify 40.9 output artifacts in run_01_blueedge. If absent, note as pipeline stage gap.

missing_artifacts.name: CKR 34-Construct Full Enumeration
missing_artifacts.impact: CKR is referenced as governing 34 constructs. AMB-005 notes the CKR 34-construct registry is not fully enumerable from available evidence. The 5 admitted signals (SIG-001..005) are confirmed. The remaining 29 constructs cannot be verified from k-pi repo alone.
missing_artifacts.search_result: PARTIAL — CKR exists; 34-construct claim cannot be fully verified from available evidence
missing_artifacts.resolution_path: Full enumeration requires access to krayu-knowledge complete registry. Not accessible for machine verification from k-pi scope.
missing_artifacts.effect_on_l1_l6: Does not affect L1-L6 verdict. Affects canonical corpus completeness.

verdict_impact_summary: Only MCA-001 (Stream 00.2) directly blocks L1-L6 CONFIRMED verdict. All other missing artifacts represent pipeline completeness gaps that do not change the current MODIFIED verdict.
